shortDescription: A soft Bluetooth headband with ultra-thin flat speakers built in — for sleeping with music, podcasts, or white noise without earbuds.
whyItIsInteresting: Sleeping with standard earbuds causes ear pressure and falling-out problems. Sleep headphone headbands use paper-thin flat speakers that sit beside rather than inside the ear — comfortable for side sleeping, no pressure, and the soft stretch fabric stays in place all night. Used by insomniacs, meditators, and ASMR listeners.
imageIdea: soft grey wireless sleep headphone headband with flat speakers worn on sleeping person on pillow
